coat_colors: fawn to mahogany with black shading

description.overview: The Belgian Laekenois is the rarest of the four Belgian Shepherd varieties, with a distinctive rough, wiry coat.
description.temperament: Laekenois are intelligent, protective, and devoted. They're slightly more reserved than other Belgian varieties.
description.health: Prone to hip dysplasia, epilepsy, and eye problems.
description.exercise: Very high energy. Need extensive daily exercise and mental stimulation.

verdict.summary: The rarest Belgian Shepherd with a unique wiry coat. Laekenois are intelligent and devoted but need experienced, active owners.
